lex.bot.button.CfnAbout: Describes a button to use on a response card used to gather slot values from a user.

lex.bot.button.Text.Description: The text that appears on the button. Use this to tell the user what value is returned when they choose this button.

lex.bot.button.Value.Description: The value returned to Amazon Lex when the user chooses this button. This must be one of the slot values configured for the slot.
